cit.basis: Flat 20% CIT on net profit under the Revenue Code; qualifying SMEs (paid-up capital <= THB 5m AND revenue <= THB 30m) use progressive brackets.

sme_regime.note: SME brackets apply to net profit: first THB 300,000 exempt; THB 300,001-3,000,000 at 15%; above THB 3,000,000 at 20%.

cit.note: Administered by The Revenue Department. Promoted BOI activities and special regimes are out of scope for this SME estimator.

wht.note: Domestic withholding: 10% on dividends, 15% on interest paid to non-residents; treaty relief may apply.

vat.note: Statutory VAT rate is 10%, temporarily reduced to 7% by repeatedly extended royal decree; current extension runs through 30 September 2025.

personal_income_tax.note: Progressive personal income tax from 5% to 35% on net income (first THB 150,000 exempt).

social_insurance.note: Social Security Fund contributions of 5% each for employee and employer, capped on a wage base of THB 15,000 per month.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
SME qualification, BOI promotion, WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
